# Vendored: Mermaid.js

- File: `mermaid.min.js`
- Source: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mermaid@10/dist/mermaid.min.js
- Version: 10.x (UMD build)
- License: MIT — https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/blob/develop/LICENSE

Vendored so `build-doc-site.mjs` can inline it into the generated HTML,
making the output fully self-contained (renders diagrams offline, no
CDN dependency at view time).
